intro: Uragoga cymosa, also known as Uragoga, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to tropical Africa. The health benefits of Uragoga cymosa include its traditional use as an anti-inflammatory and antibacterial agent, with potential applications in wound healing and the management of various infections.
